  [file] · myapp                                                                                    
  feature/add-auth → main · 1 uncommitted · 2 commits                                               
  PR #42: Add authentication                                                                        
Keybindings:                                                                                        
                                                                                                    
  [m]          Cycle mode (file -> diff -> commit)                                                  
  [v] [1]      File view mode                                                                       
  [d] [2]      File diff mode                                                                       
  [c] [3]      Commit mode                                                                          
                                                                                                    
  [h] [left]   Scroll left (when wrap off)                                                          
  [l] [right]  Scroll right (when wrap off)                                                         
  [,]          Focus sidebar                                                                        
  [.]          Focus main pane                                                                      
  [tab]        Toggle focus (sidebar / main pane)                                                   
                                                                                                    
  [j] [down]   Move down / scroll down                                                              
  [k] [up]     Move up / scroll up                                                                  
  [pgup/pgdn]  Page up / page down                                                                  
  [gg]         Go to top                                                                            
  [G]          Go to bottom                                                                         
                                                                                                    
  [+] [=]      Grow sidebar                                                                         
  [-]          Shrink sidebar                                                                       
  [f]          Toggle sidebar visibility                                                            
                                                                                                    
  [w]          Toggle word wrap                                                                     
  [n]          Toggle line numbers (file view)
